result.stdout:
Description:
  BeeYard CLI

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  login      Login to BeeYard and persist obtained access token. Provide password either through STDIN or interactively
  cell       See help for 'read, search, remove, aggregate' subcommands and 'file' subgroup
  workspace  See help for 'read, search' subcommands
  event      See help for 'search' subcommand
  export     See help for 'cell, archive, tenant' subcommands
  import     See help for 'cell, folder, file, archive, tenant' subcommands
  hive       See help for 'info, profile' subcommands
  idapi      See help for 'user' subgroup

result.stdout:
Description:
  See help for 'read, search, remove, aggregate' subcommands and 'file' subgroup

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  read <Cell IDs>    Read cell []
  search             Search cells.
  remove <Cell IDs>  Remove cell []
  aggregate          Aggregate cells
  file               See help for 'read' subcommand

result.stdout:
Description:
  Aggregate cells

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell aggregate [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>            Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -p, --pipeline <pipeline>  Aggregation pipeline. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected.
  -o, --output <Csv|Json>    Output format. [default: Json]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -o, --output <Csv|Json>    Output format. [default: Json]

result.stdout:

  See help for 'read' subcommand

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell file [command] [options]

commands.payload:

Options:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Read file from cell and write its content to file

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell file read [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                        Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -c, --cell-id <cell-id> (REQUIRED)     Cell ID
  -f, --filename <filename> (REQUIRED)   Filename
  -o, --output <output>                  Output file path. File with source filename will be created in current working directory if omitted
  --info                                 Only show file info without downloading the file content [default: False]
  -v, --object-version <object-version>  File object version. Only available if hive uses object storage as a binary storage. --info option is ignored
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Read file from cell and write its content to file

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell file read [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                        Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -c, --cell-id <cell-id> (REQUIRED)     Cell ID
  -f, --filename <filename> (REQUIRED)   Filename
  -o, --output <output>                  Output file path. File with source filename will be created in current working directory if omitted
  --info                                 Only show file info without downloading the file content [default: False]
  -v, --object-version <object-version>  File object version. Only available if hive uses object storage as a binary storage. --info option is ignored
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Remove cell

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell remove [<Cell IDs>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <Cell IDs>  Cell IDs. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected []

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>    Target namespace. The cell is removed from all namespaces if omitted.
  -i, --interactive              Cell IDs will be entered interactively. Cell ID option will be ignored. [default: False]
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Remove cells in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell remove [<Cell IDs>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <Cell IDs>  Cell IDs. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected []

Options:

  -n, --namespace <namespace>    Target namespace. The cell is removed from all namespaces if omitted.
  -i, --interactive              Cell IDs will be entered interactively. Cell ID option will be ignored. [default: False]
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Remove cells in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search cells.

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell search [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                               Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -f, --filter <filter>                         Cell filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                   Target namespace. All namespaces are searched if omitted.
  -p, --page-index <page-index>                 Page index. [default: 0]
  -s, --page-size <page-size>                   Page size. [default: 100]
  -r, --sort-field <Created|Modified|Uploaded>  Sorting field. [default: Created]
  -d, --sort-dir <Asc|Desc>                     Sorting direction. [default: Asc]
  -a, --all                                     Search all cells. Page index will be ignored and cells will be search through batches of page size. [default: False]
  -c, --count                                   Output cell count only. Sort field and direction and all option will be ignored. [default: False]
  -o, --output <Id|Json>                        Output format. [default: Id]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Search cells.

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli cell search [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                               Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -f, --filter <filter>                         Cell filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                   Target namespace. All namespaces are searched if omitted.
  -p, --page-index <page-index>                 Page index. [default: 0]
  -s, --page-size <page-size>                   Page size. [default: 100]
  -r, --sort-field <Created|Modified|Uploaded>  Sorting field. [default: Created]
  -d, --sort-dir <Asc|Desc>                     Sorting direction. [default: Asc]
  -a, --all                                     Search all cells. Page index will be ignored and cells will be search through batches of page size. [default: False]
  -c, --count                                   Output cell count only. Sort field and direction and all option will be ignored. [default: False]
  -o, --output <Id|Json>                        Output format. [default: Id]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search events.

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli event search [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -f, --filter <filter>          Event filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. Filter events by cell ID example: '{ "event.cellId": UUID("your-cell-id")}' [default: {}]
  -p, --page-index <page-index>  Page index. [default: 0]
  -s, --page-size <page-size>    Page size. [default: 100]
  -d, --sort-dir <Asc|Desc>      Sorting direction. [default: Asc]
  -a, --all                      Search all events. Page index will be ignored and events will be search through batches of page size. [default: False]
  -c, --count                    Output event count only. Sort direction and all option will be ignored. [default: False]
  -o, --output <Json|Short>      Output format. [default: Short]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -p, --page-index <page-index>  Page index. [default: 0]
  -s, --page-size <page-size>    Page size. [default: 100]
  -d, --sort-dir <Asc|Desc>      Sorting direction. [default: Asc]
  -a, --all                      Search all events. Page index will be ignored and events will be search through batches of page size. [default: False]
  -c, --count                    Output event count only. Sort direction and all option will be ignored. [default: False]
  -o, --output <Json|Short>      Output format. [default: Short]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Description:
  Export cell archive to disk

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli export archive [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>              Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -o, --output <output>        Output file path. [default: export.zip]
  -f, --filter <filter>        Cell filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]

  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Export cells to disk

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli export cell [<Cell IDs>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <Cell IDs>  Cell IDs. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected []

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -d, --dir <dir>                Target directory. Will be created if it doesn't exist. [default: export]
  -i, --interactive              Cell IDs will be entered interactively. Cell ID option and STDIN will be ignored. [default: False]
  --overwrite                    Overwrite already exported cells. [default: False]
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Export cells in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Export cells to disk

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli export cell [<Cell IDs>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <Cell IDs>  Cell IDs. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected []

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -d, --dir <dir>                Target directory. Will be created if it doesn't exist. [default: export]
  -i, --interactive              Cell IDs will be entered interactively. Cell ID option and STDIN will be ignored. [default: False]
  --overwrite                    Overwrite already exported cells. [default: False]
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Export cells in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Export tenant backup archive to disk

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli export tenant [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>        Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -o, --output <output>  Output file path. [default: tenant.zip]
  -f, --filter <filter>  Cell filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]
  --skip-cells           Skip cells. If set to true, cell filter will be ignored and no cells will be exported. [default: False]
  --skip-events          Skip events. If set to false, all events will be exported. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

  -o, --output <output>  Output file path. [default: tenant.zip]
  -f, --filter <filter>  Cell filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]
  --skip-cells           Skip cells. If set to true, cell filter will be ignored and no cells will be exported. [default: False]
  --skip-events          Skip events. If set to false, all events will be exported. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Profile hive. Profile uploading, querying and removing cells.

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli hive profile [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>              Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -c, --count <count>          Number of created cells. [default: 1000]
  -p, --path <path>            Path folder of cell descriptor. Empty cell assumed if omitted.
  -n, --namespace <namespace>  Target namespace. No workspace tag will be added to created cells if omitted.
  --filename <filename>        Profile reading file. Profile stage omitted, if filename not provided.
  --report                     Write report to profile_{test-id}.csv file. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli import [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  cell <Cell descriptor paths>  Import cells to hive. Already imported cells are skipped. []
  folder <Folder paths>         Import folders to hive []
  file <File paths>             Import files to hive []

  tenant <Archive path.>        Restore tenant from archive

result.stdout:

  Import cell archive to hive

  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli import archive <Archive path.> [options]

  -u, --uri <uri>    Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  --overwrite-cells  Overwrite existing cells. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Import cells to hive. Already imported cells are skipped.

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli import cell [<Cell descriptor paths>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <Cell descriptor paths>  Cell descriptor ('cell.descr') paths. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected []

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>    Optionally change the namespace the cell belongs to. Works only if the cell belongs to a single namespace. []
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Import cells in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>    Optionally change the namespace the cell belongs to. Works only if the cell belongs to a single namespace. []
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Import cells in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Import files to hive

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli import file [<File paths>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <File paths>  File paths. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected []

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>    Files will be imported to this namespace. BeeYard default namespace will be used if omitted.
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>  Import files in N parallel streams. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Login to BeeYard and persist obtained access token. Provide password either through STDIN or interactively

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli login [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>               Id Api URI. The value is also read from 'BY_ID_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/id/]
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)  Username
  --write-header                Create header file with access token for curl in current dir
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search workspaces

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli workspace search [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                                     Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -f, --filter <filter>                               Workspace filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]
  -r, --sort-field <Created|Modified|Name|Namespace>  Sorting field. [default: Namespace]
  -d, --sort-dir <Asc|Desc>                           Sorting direction. [default: Asc]
  -p, --page-index <page-index>                       Page index. [default: 0]
  -s, --page-size <page-size>                         Page size. [default: 100]
  -o, --output <Id|Json|Long|Short>                   Output format. [default: Short]
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Search workspaces

Usage:
  DataVision.BeeYard.Cli workspace search [options]

Options:
  -u, --uri <uri>                                     Hive URI. The value is also read from 'BY_HIVE_URI' env var. https scheme and trailing slash is added if omitted. [default: http://localhost/hive/]
  -f, --filter <filter>                               Workspace filter. Read from STDIN if STDIN redirected. [default: {}]
  -r, --sort-field <Created|Modified|Name|Namespace>  Sorting field. [default: Namespace]
  -d, --sort-dir <Asc|Desc>                           Sorting direction. [default: Asc]
  -p, --page-index <page-index>                       Page index. [default: 0]
  -s, --page-size <page-size>                         Page size. [default: 100]
  -o, --output <Id|Json|Long|Short>                   Output format. [default: Short]
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
